changelog: Big speed-up across the home screen — streaming services, decades, themes, and genre rows now load posters and backdrops from inside the app itself instead of the TMDB CDN. ~100x faster paint on focus (5 ms vs 500-800 ms). The app is ~3 MB larger but the responsiveness gain is dramatic, especially on Fire Sticks.
Logos and posters can be hot-patched server-side without an app update if a streaming service rebrands.
